text: Managing a team effectively requires a balance of several key skills. First, clear communication is essential to ensure everyone understands their roles and the team’s goals. Delegation is also important; trust your team members by assigning tasks that match their strengths. Providing regular feedback helps people improve and feel valued. To keep motivation high, recognize achievements and encourage collaboration. Finally, when conflicts arise, address them calmly and listen to all sides before finding a fair solution. By focusing on these areas, you can build a productive and supportive team environment.
